Train Cancellations.name: Loghaaye Ghataee Shode
Train Cancellations.description: Logha az seda ya ta'khir-e shaded ba khabar-e na-kafi ya jabraan-e na-kafi

Train Ticket Prices.name: Gheymat-e Belit-e Logha
Train Ticket Prices.description: Keraye raahahan kheyli goran, afzaayesh-e boland-tar az tavalod-e saali, gheymat-gozari-ye gheyr-hamsooz

Flight Delays.name: Ta'khir-e Paarvaz
Flight Delays.description: Paarvazha ta'khir-shodeh ya loghaaye ghataee, mowasalat-e badeh, doshvari dar talab-e jabraan

Lost Luggage.name: Chanteh-ha-ye Gom Shode
Lost Luggage.description: Chanteh-ha ke be manzel-e maghsad naresedan, paygiri-ye arom, jabraan-e na-kafi

Bus Route Cuts.name: Qati' Kardane Khatt-e Avtoboos
Bus Route Cuts.description: Khatthaye loghaaye ghataee, taqdid-e baromad, javamee-ye rosteei az destan-e avtoboos mahroom mishavand

Pothole Damage.name: Khesarat-e Chahshanbah-ha
Pothole Damage.description: Chahshanbah-ha ke khodroha va baasiklit-savarane dar khatar hastand, shahr-darane arom dar tamir

Parking Fines.name: Jarime-ha-ye Parkinge Khosusi
Parking Fines.description: Hozine-ha-ye gheyr-adil-e parkinge khosusi, jabraan-e tond, alame-ha-ye gom-kunandeh

Fuel Prices.name: Gheymat-e Sookht
Fuel Prices.description: Gheymat-e benzin va dizel kheyli boland, kam shodan-e arom vaghti kharije sookht paeen miad

Broadband Speed.name: Sorat-e Internet
Broadband Speed.description: Sorat-e internet kheyli kam-tar az آن چه tashtahar shode va pardakht shode

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: Monfaqat-e Beesignal
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.description: Beesignal dar khaneh, mahall-e kar, ya khatt-e havaee-ye hamrah

Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: Afzaayesh-e Gheymat dar Miane-ye Gharardad
Price Rises Mid-Contract.description: Gozayesh-e telfon, internet va TV ke dar jareyan-e gharardad-e ghabz shonde

Customer Service Hold Times.name: Vaqt-e Entezaar bar Khat
Customer Service Hold Times.description: Sa'at ha dar entezaar baraye Sohbet ba yek fard

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: Doshvari dar Loghaaye Aboonemandhaye
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.description: Sherkatha ekhtetear-e sakht mikunand baraye loghaaye ya azma-ye aboonemandhaye

Roaming Charges.name: Hozine-ha-ye Roaming
Roaming Charges.description: Hozine-ha-ye giri-ye mobail-e gheyre montazar dar safar-e khareji, afzaayesh-e gheymat ba post-Brexit

Energy Bill Costs.name: Hozine-ha-ye Sura-ye Enerzhi
Energy Bill Costs.description: Sura-ye gaz va bargh ke gheyr-ghabel-e tahammol ast, gheymat-ghap hanooz kheyli boland

Inaccurate Energy Bills.name: Sura-ha-ye Enerzhi-ye Gheyrat-Zaaf
Inaccurate Energy Bills.description: Miqdar-ha-ye tahmine-shodeh ghaylan, ziyadeh giri, khata-ha-ye sura keshi

Water Bill Increases.name: Afzaayesh-e Sura-ye Aab
Water Bill Increases.description: Sura-ye aab ke kheyli billand mishavad va kamyat-e khidmat padeen miad

Sewage in Rivers.name: Fazeolat dar Roodkhane-ha
Sewage in Rivers.description: Sherkatha-ye aab khame ham inja fazeolat-e khaam dar avshan va sahele daryaye

Power Cuts.name: Qat'-e Bargh
Power Cuts.description: Qate'-e tadaad-e bargh, arom dar bar-gozari, jabraan-e na-kafi

Smart Meter Problems.name: Moshkilat-e Smart Meter
Smart Meter Problems.description: Smart meter-ha kar nakunand, az dast-e kar aftad pas az tablid-e barnameh-i

Bank Branch Closures.name: Bastan-e Shobe-ha-ye Bank
Bank Branch Closures.description: Shobe-ha-ye bank-e mahalle ke bashmichavand, javamee az dstan rahi baraye dastressi nadaran

Hidden Bank Charges.name: Hozine-ha-ye Penhani-ye Bank
Hidden Bank Charges.description: Hozine-ha-ye na-montazar baraye overdraft, taraf-e kharji, nigaresh-e hesab

Fraud and Scam Losses.name: Ziyan-ha-ye Taghalob va Taloot
Fraud and Scam Losses.description: Bank-ha ke az dast-dahi-ye gorbagha va jalb-e push az tool-e pezeershi enkar mikunand

Insurance Claim Rejections.name: Red Kardane Talab-ha-ye Bimeh
Insurance Claim Rejections.description: Talabha ke bar asas-e joziyyat red mishavand pas az sal-ha-ye parde haye bimeh

Mortgage Rate Shock.name: Sok-e Nezhat-e Geroh
Mortgage Rate Shock.description: Payan-e nerkh-e sabat va enteghal be nerkh-e motazzaker-e kheyli boland-tar

Overseas Transfer Fees.name: Hozine-ha-ye Enteghal-e Khareji
Overseas Transfer Fees.description: Hozine-ha-ye ziyadeh va nerkh-e badbakhti-ye badi baraye enteghal-e pule beyn-ol-melli

NHS Waiting Times.name: Vaqt-e Entezaar-e NHS
NHS Waiting Times.description: Entezaar-e chand-ma'ah ya chand-sal baraye ameliyyat va molaqat-ha-ye motekhassis

GP Appointment Access.name: Dastressi be Molaqat-ha-ye GP
GP Appointment Access.description: Natavan rah be entezar-e GP, entezaar-e hafteh-ha

Dentist Availability.name: Dastres-i be Dand-Pezesk
Dentist Availability.description: Na-momken-e peydan kardane yek dand-pezesk-e NHS ke beygaran-e noo ghobool konad

Mental Health Service Waits.name: Entezaar-e Khidmat-e Salamat-e Zehani
Mental Health Service Waits.description: Entezaar-e chand-ma'ah baraye darmane va hemayat-e salamat-e zehani

Prescription Costs.name: Hozine-ha-ye Noskhe
Prescription Costs.description: Hozine-ye gozide kheyli boland dar Engelestan, akhtelaf dar jahan-e UK

Hospital Parking Charges.name: Hozine-ha-ye Parkinge Bimaarestaan
Hospital Parking Charges.description: Pardakht baraye parkinge dar bimaarestaan dar hale bemari ya didan-e bemar

Rent Increases.name: Afzaayesh-e Ejaarah
Rent Increases.description: Ejaarah-e khosusi ke far-tar az tavalod-e saali boland mir-avad, ta'dhib-e tabeed bi-gonah

Council Tax Rises.name: Afzaayesh-e Maliyat-e Shavra
Council Tax Rises.description: Afzaayesh-e saliane-ye maliyat-e shavra dar hale kherad-shod-e khidmat-ha

Noisy Neighbours.name: Hamassayeh-ha-ye Soltusan
Noisy Neighbours.description: Azyaaye adavat-e tavaval, shavra-ha-ye arom dar amal, ta'sir bar salamat-e zehani

Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Taghyirat-e Jame'-aavari-ye Zibale
Rubbish Collection Changes.description: Kam-shod-e jame' aavari, qavaanin-e gom-kunandeh baraye baaztavzib, sanador-ha-ye por

Planning Permission Abuse.name: Sou-estef'al-e Ejaze-ye Barnameh Rizi
Planning Permission Abuse.description: Abalegh-e na-khasteh ghobool, sabze-ye sabz dar ta'tish, javame be tavajooh nadand

Damp and Mould in Housing.name: Roshoobeh va Kabirok dar Maskan
Damp and Mould in Housing.description: Molk-dar va anjoman-ha-ye maskan ke roshoobeh va kabirok ra tamir nakunand

Delivery Problems.name: Moshkilat-e Taslim
Delivery Problems.description: Baste-ha gom shodeh, bakhsh bar baran, alame-ye taslim shode vali daryaft nashode

Shrinkflation.name: Kamtar Kardan-e Andazeh
Shrinkflation.description: Mahsoole ke kamtar mishavad dar hale ke gheymat-ha same ya kheyli boland mishavad

Refund Difficulties.name: Doshvari dar Bakhsh Gheymat
Refund Difficulties.description: Sherkatha ke bakhsh-e gheymat va baztahran-e kheyli moskhel mikunand

Fake Reviews.name: Neqd-o-Essi-ha-ye Jali
Fake Reviews.description: Natavan be neqd-o-essi-ha-ye online etemmad kord, neqd-o-essi-ha-ye jali-ye misbeh gom-kunandeh

Subscription Traps.name: Dami-ha-ye Aboonemandhaye
Subscription Traps.description: Azma-ye azadi ke be pardakhti tabdil mishavand bedun-e ekhtiyar-e roshan, sakhte loghaaye

Food Quality Decline.name: Padeen Amdan-e Keyfiyat-e Ghaza
Food Quality Decline.description: Ghaza-ye amaadeh keyfiyat-e khrab-tar, bekhsh-ha-ye kamtar, ezafat-e beshtar

Self-Checkout Frustration.name: Naaramandi-ye Safre-ye Khode
Self-Checkout Frustration.description: Mashine-ha-ye khode-khadmat na-paayedar, jaye karz-ha-ye bashar

Cost of Childcare.name: Hozine-ha-ye Negahdari-ye Koudak
Cost of Childcare.description: Hozine-ha-ye negahdari-ye kodak kheyli goran, hozine kardane sommeddi ra mehhood mikonad

Student Loan Repayment.name: Bazpardakht-e Qarz-e Taahsil
Student Loan Repayment.description: Forooghte-aye ke baraye dahsale bazpardakht mikunand, avaz-e nedal va baha-ye sood

Dog Fouling.name: Kalagh-e Sag
Dog Fouling.description: Kalagh-e sag dar faza-ha-ye savahi, baghche-ha va piadaro ke pofak nashode

AI Replacing Jobs.name: Jaye Giri-ye AI az Kar
AI Replacing Jobs.description: Andisheh-ye na-aram dar mored-e aql-e mossanahi ke kar-ha ra otomatize mikonad bedun-e hemayat-e enteghal

Avanti West Coast.name: Avanti West Coast
Avanti West Coast.description: operatöri räyli-ye UK ke khidmat dahi West Coast Main Line

Southern / Thameslink.name: Southern / Thameslink
Southern / Thameslink.description: operatöri räyli-ye UK ke khidmat dahi London va janub

Northern Trains.description: operatöri räyli-ye UK ke khidmat dahi shomäl-e Engelestan

TransPennine Express.name: TransPennine Express
TransPennine Express.description: operatöri räyli-ye UK ke khidmat dahi masir-haye trans-Pennine

LNER.name: LNER
LNER.description: operatöri räyli-ye UK ke khidmat dahi East Coast Main Line

BT / EE.name: BT / EE
BT / EE.description: farahan-de bozorg-e pahlove-band va telefonhaye mobil-e UK

Virgin Media O2.description: farahan-de pahlove-band, TV, va mobil-e UK

Sky.description: farahan-de TV, pahlove-band, va mobil-e UK

Vodafone.description: sherkat-e jahani-ye telecoms ke dar UK markaz darat

Rent Increases: sahebekhoone dare ejare ro bala mibare
AI Replacing Jobs: robotha daran jaye kargara ro migirand

transport.agent_quote: Yeki az rioter-ha komak kard ke 6 ta da'va-ye bāzpardākht dar yek safar-e takh'ir shode file kone. Ānhā £47 qabel az resiidan be Birmingham kamāl kard.
transport.agent_bio: Alg-hā-ye loghv-e qatār rā peek mikon, kāghaz-hā-ye bāzpardākht rā medevireh mikonad, har pahnehāde'ye moqtrah rā barresi mikonad, va barā-ye ārāye Regulatory mā'elomāt jam' mikon. Ădāde hā rā hisāb mikonad tā rioter-hā be cheeze-hāye mohemm tmarkoz konan.
transport.human_quote: Mofazzal-e man az Quiet Riot: didan-e tim-e social media-ye Avanti vaqti 400 nafar-e mā hamzamān tweet kordim.
transport.human_bio: Mosafer-e montazam-e Manchester ke 3 sāl dar khāt-e Avanti bud qabel az inke hāzm shavad. Komak mikonad ke rioter-hā dar hamān khāt-hā jam' shavand, share mikonad che chiz'hā kār mikon, va jānebi-ye ensāni-ye amr rā miāvard.
transport.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā barā-ye hold khordan be sherkathā-ye transport-e UK dar ba'b-e loghv, takh'ir, va qimat - va motmaen shavad ke hame chiz-e ke estehqāq dārand mi-donand.
transport.focus_detail: Sakht-e dataset-e loghv'hā bā vaqt, khāt, va esbāb barā-ye ersel be ORR. Dar hāl-e peyghiri-ye 340 ta loghv ke dar in māh az rioter-hā report shode.

telecoms.agent_quote: Speed test barā-ye 200 rioter anjām dād. Miangin 18 Mbps bud. Ānhā barā-ye 65 pāyegi mikardand.
telecoms.agent_bio: Sorāt-e broadband rā tahlil mikonad, dade-hā-ye moqāyese-ye provider rā jam' mikonad, va komak mikonad be rioter-hā barā-ye sāz-e mā'elomāt barā-ye Ofcom. Agar ettesāl-e shomā ārom ast, Pulse sābet mikonad.
telecoms.human_quote: Tamām-e khiyābān hamrāh broadband taghiir dād. Provider-e qadim letter-hā-ye 'lotfan bargard' barā-ye har khāneye sent kard.
telecoms.human_bio: London-neshan-e fehn-āvār ke az pardākht barā-ye sorāt-e broadband ke aslan pāyān neshod khaste shod. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā provider-hā rā moqāyese konand, hamrāh switch konand, va mā'elomāt-e speed test share konand.
telecoms.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā broadband va service-e mobile rā ke pardākht mikānand dāsht bashnd - va bedonand che kār konand vaqti ke nayāyand.
telecoms.focus_detail: Jam'āvari-ye mā'elomāt az rioter-hāyi ke bā afsāyesh-e CPI+ mowāje shodand barā-ye ersel be Ofcom. 890 rioter dar 4 provider āsib-dideh.

energy.agent_quote: Komak kard be yek rioter tā hesāb konad ke £340 bish az hād dar bill-hā-ye estimated pardākht karde. Email-e ozr-khāhi-ye energy company az original ghārar dvaltar bud.
energy.agent_bio: Alg-hā-ye bill rā tahlil mikonad, overpayment-hā rā detect mikonad, va barā-ye ersel be regulator mā'elomāt jam' mikonad. Agar energy company-ye shomā nakh'r mikonad, Spark mā'elomāt rā peyda mikonad.
energy.human_quote: Yek rioter £340 bāzgāsht gābt pas az inke 2 sāl overpayment sābet shod. Dar telefon geriye kard.
energy.human_bio: Bristol-makān ke komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā bill-hāye khod rā challenge konand, switch rā navigate konand, va barā-ye Ofgem mā'elomāt jam' konand. Bāzār-e energy rā khub mi-shenāsad.
energy.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā bill-hā-ye nā-monfāyet challenge konand, hekmāt-tar switch konand, va motmaen shavand ke energy company-hā drost amal konand.
energy.focus_detail: Tahlil-e dade-hā-ye bill az 2 sāl az 340 rioter barā-ye shnāsāyesh-e alg-hā-ye overpayment-e systematic barā-ye ersel be Ofgem.

water.agent_quote: Komak kard be 200 rioter tā sewage report dar yek vikand file konand. Inbox-e Thames Water niyāz be inbox-e khod dasht.
water.agent_bio: Akhraj-e sewage rā monitor mikonad, āmulkard-e water company rā track mikonad, va barā-ye EA va Ofwat mā'elomāt jam' mikonad. Bar har outlet va overflow nazar negāh midar.
water.human_quote: Beach rā 3 hafteh zudtar bāz kardim bā neshān-dadan-e inke sewage data ghāt bud.
water.human_bio: Serfer-e Cornwall ke az sewage warning'hāye bāz-kardan-e beach-e khodash khaste shod. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā sewage-hā report konand, mā'elomāt-e water quality jam' konand, va bā EA hamāhengi konand.
water.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā water company-hā rā hold khordan dar ba'b-e sewage, bill, va khetmat-e service.
water.focus_detail: Mapping-e akhraj event'hā dar moqābel-e dade-hā-ye company-reported. 200 report az rioter peyhnehād mikonad under-reporting dar 3 outlet.

banking.agent_quote: Komak kard tā complaint-i rā draft kone ke cherā'ye bank barā-ye ozr khāhi tāleb telefon kard qabel az inke send shavad.
banking.agent_bio: Bank charge-hā rā barresi mikonad, sāxtemān-e fee rā tahlil mikonad, va komak mikonad tā mā'elomāt-e complaint-e FCA sakht shavad. Agar fee-ye penhān hast, Chip peyda mikonad.
banking.human_quote: Barclays branch closure-e khod rā pas negāh gāsht pas az inke 1,200 nafar-e mā dar consultation hāzer shodim.
banking.human_bio: Kārmand-e sabq-e bank az Birmingham ke az dākhel dîde ast chetor complaint'hā vāgh'ān handle mishan. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā complaint'hā-ye behtar write konand va system rā navigate konand.
banking.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā bā charge-hā-ye nā-monfāyet, branch closure, va poor service az bank'hā rāfetār konnand.
banking.focus_detail: Hamāhengi-ye response barā-ye 12 ta closure az pish. Jam'āvari-ye impact statement az communities-e āsib-dideh.

health.agent_quote: Komak kard tā 3 ta NHS dentist peyda konand ke patient bepazir konand. Rioter fekr kard mān dāruq migam.
health.agent_bio: Waiting time-hā rā track mikonad, availability rā peyda mikonad, va komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā system rā navigate konand. Agar masir-e sari'tar hast, Cura naqshe mikonad.
health.human_quote: Yek rioter az letter template-e mā استفاده kard tā referral fast-track shavad. 18 māh 6 hafte shod.
health.human_bio: Parvarda az Liverpool ke her doh taraf-e NHS rā dîde ast. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā waiting list navigate konand, letter-hā-ye effective write konand, va bā cheeze-hāyi ke vāgh'ān kār mikonad share konand.
health.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā NHS waiting time-hā navigate konand, availability peyda konand, va option-hāye khod rā bedonand.
health.focus_detail: Jam'āvari-ye call data az 500 rioter barā-ye sāxtan-e tasvir-e real-world access. Enteshār-e yāfteh-hā be health board-hā-ye local.

housing.agent_quote: Komak kard tā 47 ta snag dar yek new build document kone. Developer pors kard āyā man building inspector hastam.
housing.agent_bio: Masāel-e property rā document mikonad, surāt-e response-e landlord rā tahlil mikonad, va barā-ye housing ombudsman submission mā'elomāt jam' mikonad. Har damp patch, har crack, log shode.
housing.human_quote: Evidence pack-e damp-e mā cherā'ye detail bud ke landlord qabel az council inspection fix kard.
housing.human_bio: Renter az London ke bā hame cheeze az damp tā landlord-hā-ye dodgy rāfetār karde. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā masāel rā dorrost document konand va option-hāye khod rā bedonand.
housing.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā bā landlord'hā, council'hā, va masāel-e housing rāfetār konand - va bedonand estehqāq-e khod chist.
housing.focus_detail: Komak be rioter-hāyi ke bā eviction-hā-ye no-fault āsib-dideh tā Renters Reform Act rā befahmand va ma'nā-ye ān chist.

shopping.agent_quote: Parcel-i rā track kardam ke 'delivered' ālamāt dāsht dar 4 neighbor, yek recycle bin, va yek greenhouse. Peyda kardam.
shopping.agent_bio: Delivery failure-hā rā track mikonad, mā'elomāt-e refund jam' mikonad, va alg-hā-ye qimat rā detect mikonad. Agar parcel-e shomā gone hast, Scout hamzamān dar joste-jo hast.
shopping.human_quote: Evri parcel-e mān 3 bār gom kard. Hālā komak mikonad be digaron tā refund rā sari'tar dāsht bashnd.
shopping.human_bio: Online shopping veteran az Edinburgh ke az parcel'hā-ye gom shode bīsh tar az in ke hesāb kone. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā refund dāsht bashnd, seller-hā rā report konand, va worst offender-hā rā avoid konand.
shopping.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā refund dāsht bashnd, parcel-hā-ye gom track konand, va retailer'hā va delivery company-hā rā hold khordan.
shopping.focus_detail: Jam'āvari-ye mā'elomāt-e delivery failure az 800 rioter barā-ye ersel be Citizens Advice va Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Komak kard tā hamān pothole rā dar 11 ta weather condition fotografe kone. Council sāren dād.
local.agent_bio: Masāel-e local rā map mikonad, response time-hā-ye council rā track mikonad, va FOI request'hā jam' mikonad. Agar pothole-e shomā 6 māh injā hast, Link mā'elomāt rā dārad.
local.human_quote: Council rāh-e mā rā fix kard pas az inke tamām-e pothole'hā rā bā foto map kardim. 11 māh, vali sākhtan kardam.
local.human_bio: Community-minded Welsh az Valleys ke sāl'hā ast ke hamān pothole'hā rā report mikonad. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā masāel-e local document konand va council'hā rā hold khordan.
local.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā masāel-e local fix shavand - pothole'hā, bin'hā, planning, noise - va council'hā rā hold khordan.
local.focus_detail: FOI request'hā barā-ye 30 council tāyfān kardan-e reported vs actual repair time. Enteshār-e result'hā be onvān-e league table.

other.agent_quote: Komak kard tā gym membership rā cancel kone ke 3 call, 2 email, va yek recorded delivery gereft. Gym hālā cancel button dārad.
other.agent_bio: Masāel-i rā handle mikonad ke neat nist. Subscription trap'hā, plastic waste, self-checkout frustration'hā - Flex alg-hā rā peyda mikonad va pressure point'hā.
other.human_quote: Yek gym chain rā motā'essed kardim tā cancel button be website-e khod ezāfe konand. 800 complaint'hā gereft.
other.human_bio: Product designer az London ke az khaste shavand'ye in hast ke company'hā chhod-o-rafte cherā sakht mi-konand. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā subscription cancel konand, dark pattern'hā avoid konand, va workaround share konand.
other.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā bā cheeze-hāyi ke neat nist - subscription'hā, refund'hā, va everyday frustration'hā.
other.focus_detail: Document kardan-e worst offender'hā va template cancellation script barā-ye har yek.

insurance.agent_quote: Komak kard be yek rioter tā clause-i peyda kone ke rejected home insurance claim rā be £4,200 payout tabdil kard. Policy-e khod-e insurer sābet kard ānhā ghāt bāshnd.
insurance.agent_bio: Policy wording rā barresi mikonad, unfair rejection pattern-hā rā detect mikonad, va barā-ye Financial Ombudsman submission mā'elomāt jam' mikonad. Agar insurer-e shomā dārah valid claim rā dodge konad, Shield leverage peyda mikonad.
insurance.human_quote: 8 rioter bā hamān rejected claim type rā connect kardam ke hamrāh submit konand. Insurer hamāh 8 tā dar 2 hafte settlement dād.
insurance.human_bio: Sabq-e ādin-e insurance az Leeds ke bedonad claim'hā vāgh'ān cherā decide mishan. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā appeal'hā behtar write konand, policy jārgon rā befahmand, va bedonand kay escalate konand.
insurance.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā fair treatment az insurer'hā - va bedonand che kār konand vaqti ke claim nā-monfāyet reject shavad.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' dar 40% az rejected claim'hā - aghlab nā-dorrost. Tahlil-e 200 case dar 3 insurer barā-ye evidence pack-e FOS.

delivery.agent_quote: Parcel-i rā trace kardam ke 'delivered' dar 6 different tracking status, 3 depot, va shed-e neighbor. 47 daqiqeh peyda kardam.
delivery.agent_bio: Āmulkard-e courier rā monitor mikonad, delivery failure rate-hā rā track mikonad, va barā-ye consumer complaint mā'elomāt jam' mikonad. Agar parcel-e shomā gone hast, Track hamzamān jar hast.
delivery.human_quote: DPD rā motā'essed kardim tā photo-evidence policy-e khod dar area-ye mā taghiir konand pas az inke 40 rioter proof az parcel'hā dar bārun submit kardand.
delivery.human_bio: Online shopper az Glasgow ke az excuse-ye 'bā safe place gozāsht-im' khaste shod. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā refund dāsht bashnd, courier-hā rā report konand, va worst offender-hā rā avoid konand.
delivery.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā parcel'hā-ye khod dorrost deliver shavand - va refund dāsht bashnd vaqti ke nayāyand.
delivery.focus_detail: Jam'āvari-ye mā'elomāt-e delivery failure az 800 rioter. Evri complaint rate: 23% - 3 bar bīsh az DPD. Sakht-e league table barā-ye Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Hesāb kardam ke Plan 2 borrower ke £30k dar sāl kamāl mikonad £47,000 fāyede qabel az in ke loan delete shavad pardākht mikonad. Original loan £40,000 bud.
education.agent_bio: Education cost-hā rā tahlil mikonad, student loan projection'hā rā analyze mikonad, va funding entitlement'hā rā peyda mikonad. Ădād rā hesāb mikonad tā student'hā va graduate'hā informed decision bgirand.
education.human_quote: Komak kardam be 12 rioter tā overpaid student loan repayment'hā claim back konand ke nemidānestam. Miāngin refund: £340.
education.human_bio: Mature student az Birmingham ke funding system rā 2 bār navigate kard. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā repayment'hā befahmand, overpayment detect konand, va threshold change challenge konand.
education.goal: Komak dādan be student'hā va graduate'hā tā education cost'hā, loan'hā, va repayment'hā navigate konand - va motmaen shavand ke bish az had pardākht nakonand.
education.focus_detail: Shnāsāyesh-e graduate'hāyi ke zir-e repayment threshold charge shodand. 12 refund processed - miāngin £340 har yek.

environment.agent_quote: Cross-reference kardam 3 sāl dade-hā-ye air quality bā hospital admission rate'hā. Correlation cherā'ye clear bud ke council nemitānest ignore kone.
environment.agent_bio: Environmental data rā track mikonad, pollution level'hā monitor mikonad, va barā-ye regulatory submission mā'elomāt jam' mikonad. Agar ădād story bego-yan mikonad, Fern peyda mikonad.
environment.human_quote: Council rā motā'essed kardim tā air quality monitor-hā instal konand pas az inke 200 rioter evidence petition rā sign kardand. Data hame cheez taghiir dād.
environment.human_bio: Environmental science graduate az Bristol ke be evidence-led change bāvar mikonad. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā environmental issue'hā document konand va case-hā sakht konand ke regulator'hā nemitāvānand ignore konand.
environment.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā environmental problem'hā document konand va polluter'hā va policymaker'hā rā bā data hold khordan.
environment.focus_detail: Mapping-e area'hāyi ke monitoring-e air quality dar 5km nadārand. 60% az pollution hotspot'hā-ye rioter-reported official monitoring nadārand.

employment.agent_quote: Workplace AI implementation data az 300 rioter jam' kardam. 40% goftand taghiir'hā bā zero consultation eshā shodand. In pattern hast, na anecdote.
employment.agent_bio: Workplace trend'hā rā tahlil mikonad, policy change'hā track mikonad, va komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā protection'hāye khod rā befahmand. Agar job-e shomā consultation bakhsh taghiir mikonad, Forge dade-hā dārad.
employment.human_quote: 30 rioter dar hamān industry facing AI change rā connect kardam. Shāyed company'hāye ānhā hamāh hamān playbook va hamān loophole'hā rā استفاده mikardand.
employment.human_bio: HR professional az Manchester ke side taghiir dād pas az didan-e inke restructuring'hā vāgh'ān cherā kār mikonad. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā option'hāye khod befahmand va response'hā hamrāh coordinate konand.
employment.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā workplace change'hā navigate konand, protection'hāye khod rā befahmand, va vaqti ke job'hā risk dārand hamrāh respond konand.
employment.focus_detail: Document kardan-e case'hāyi ke AI tool'hā bedun-e staff consultation introduce shodand. Sakht-e report dar ba'b-e employer obligation'hā.

tech.agent_quote: Peyda kardam ke 3 major app location data jam' mikārand hattā vaqti ke permission'hā 'never' set astān. Complaint barā-ye hamāh ba ICO file kardam.
tech.agent_bio: Platform policy'hā monitor mikonad, dark pattern'hā track mikonad, va komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā befahmand tech company'hā bā dade-hā-ye ānhā chikār mikonand. Agar app misbehave konad, Glitch catch mikonad.
tech.human_quote: Mass data subject access request barā-ye yek social media company organize kardam. Vaqti 500 nafar hamzamān ask konand, ānhā majbur'ānd seriously take konand.
tech.human_bio: Software developer az Edinburgh ke az gap bain-e moqā'alāt-e tech company va delivery-ye ānhā khaste shod. Komak mikonad be rioter-hā tā data right'hāye khod exercise konand va dark pattern'hā detect konand.
tech.goal: Komak dādan be rioter-hā tā against dark pattern'hā, data misuse, va unfair tech practice'hā push konand.
tech.focus_detail: Audit-e top 50 app barā-ye permission creep - requesting access ke niyāz nadārand. Sakht-e report barā-ye ICO.
